top_signals.title: Pimco Warns a Wave of Defaults Is Coming for Low-Quality Borrowers
top_signals.summary: Heavy spending on AI could widen economic outcomes and hit lower-quality loans, the firm says.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Potential liquidity or banking-system instability affecting financial conditions.

top_signals.title: UK Economy Set to Shrink as Iran Energy Shock Hits Growth
top_signals.summary: The UK economy is expected to contract despite a boost at the start of the year, with economists warning that the war in Iran’s energy price shock will now show up in fresh data.  Economists believe that the UK economy declined by 0.1 per cent in April. Official figures will be published on Friday.  The drop in growth momentum will reflect the late impact of the war in Iran on businesses and consumers, City analysts have said, as political uncertainty around the Labour Party’s leadership could also dampen activity.  Deutsche…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Asia faces risks of economic spillover from Iran and AI disinformation
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin rises despite US inflation hitting 3-year high: Where will BTC price go?
top_signals.summary: BTC's rebound shows signs of weakening under a string of technical resistance levels, raising the odds of a dip below $60,000 in June.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Humaniod robotics company raises up to $1.4 billion from Nvidia, Amazon and others
top_signals.summary: Investors have rushed to back companies in the physical AI space
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Chinese investors turn to digital bets for exposure to US tech IPOs
top_signals.summary: Manoeuvres highlight the lengths traders are willing to go to get exposure to hot western investments despite risks

top_signals.title: Chile copper mines pursue tie-up to cut costs
top_signals.summary: Sierra Gorda and Spence will assess joint opportunities as both operations tackle lower grades and productivity pressures.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Trump doubles down on Pulte for intelligence post, calls for short-term extension of foreign surveillance law
top_signals.summary: Unless Congress acts, a key provision of the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act will expire at the end of this week.

top_signals.title: Microsoft patches YellowKey, GreenPlasma, MiniPlasma zero-days
top_signals.summary: On Tuesday, Microsoft patched two zero-day vulnerabilities that let attackers gain SYSTEM privileges on fully patched Windows systems, and a third one that grants access to BitLocker-protected drives. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
